items.title: Migrant's multi-million-dollar plan to save a dying outback town

children.content: A decade after the last coal truck rumbled out of Leigh Creek, Baljit Singh Bajwa put millions of dollars on the line to invest in the shrinking mining town.

items.title: Adelaide fans gather in early morning cold to watch Socceroos

children.content: Thousands of people flocked to sites across Australia to show their support as the Socceroos fell short against World Cup host USA.

items.title: Multiple SA voters who 'definitely voted' surprised by failure to vote notices

children.content: Multiple voters have received notices from the Electoral Commission of South Australia informing them they will be fined for not voting in the state election, despite having voted.

items.title: 'Tony Modra is awake': Ricciuto describes optimism for star's recovery

articles.title: Ratugolea hospitalised as Port suffer injury carnage in loss to Magpies

items.title: Why these retirees won't give up the 3:30am starts and 14-hour shifts

items.title: Inquest to probe Adelaide fashion icon's death after using magic mushrooms

items.title: 'Sleepwalking into a catastrophe': Proposed data centre raises water fears

items.title: Would you live in a 1930s pump station? This couple made one their home

children.content: From former post offices to pumping stations, there are buildings with commercial histories all around Australia. Could repurposing them into homes help with the housing supply?

items.title: Sarah Game won't rule out introducing another bill to restrict late term abortion

children.content: Family First upper house MLC Sarah Game has not ruled out introducing another bill restricting late-term abortion access, after her proposed legislation to restrict abortion after 25 weeks failed in the lower house last night.

items.title: Mother holds onto hope her son's killer will be found after remote WA murder
